originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&val` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF true)
     (= ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME true)
     (= ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP false))
model:
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Line 16: `val = (s && s[1]) ? s+1 : NULL` inside make_device() (compiled when CONF=T AND RENAME=T). After this assignment, val is never read again — the REGEXP block (L18-34) uses 'a' and 's' not 'val'. So val is a dead store at L16 regardless of REGEXP. No '// ERROR' at L16 → new bug not in VBDB. PC adds REGEXP=F unnecessarily; the dead store exists even when REGEXP=T. The required condition is just CONF=T AND RENAME=T. PC is over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
